channel.title: Posts on ilhamije
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on ilhamije

item.title: Static Page Generator Confuses Me
item.description: I want to use github pages to host my static blog. I’m lazy to do it on hosting company. Not gonna do that in the near future. I tried Jekyll, I don’t feel confortable doing it. Changed my mind, and chose Hugo. Then confused by Hugo. I followed technical tutorial on web. Do the steps carefully, but ended up in the middle of blank website that only shows my README file content :sweat:

item.title: Resurrecting Old Dream
item.description: Finally! I got accepted as Master Student at University of Indonesia. It’s been one of my step closer to my dream: to create things that matter in the world of AI/ML. Yeah, I’m going to say this classic line : To create a better world. Maybe creating one ML project every month is not too much, right? Let’s do it.
